snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.task: 019f44e0-b6a1-7bb0-a1ca-5fb43b2725c2 Production Ready B restore identity and recovery CLEAR
reviewers.independence: UI Design independently verified the exact d12280c1 replacement patch, confirmed the safe restore result DTO, typed preview warnings, six-locale native copy and cancellation-first irreversible confirmation, and returned ACCEPTED/CLEAR without editing files. Development did not edit governance; Product Planning independently matched identity, Job ownership, recovery, binding-CAS and evidence-selector facts before this current-only projection.

dimensions.summary: The existing restore preview and native confirmation own explicit clone/replace choices, safe typed warnings and cancellation-first safety without adding navigation, path exposure or another management surface.

Data, Job, API, Settings, Sync, Reliability, Decision and Playbook owners agree on a machine-local pre-destination Restore Job, fresh-folder identity modes, verified rollback, binding CAS and linked vault Operation.

Eight exact selectors bind legacy lineage, identity recovery, rollback, checkpoint adoption, durable Operation, active binding CAS and safe UI only to existing partial Vault, Job, Settings, Backup, i18n and Exit projections.

Development gets one exact eight-checkpoint restore coordinator contract, explicit identity modes and one cross-scope Job/Operation link while preserving source vault bytes, writer-lease ownership and fail-closed destination publication.

Existing subject owners, Decision, Playbook and acceptance surfaces absorb the exact adoption; no PRD, prototype, new document, dependency, provider, permission, schema-layout or status expansion is introduced.

verification.evidence: The exact restore identity/recovery candidate passes docs, decisions, UI, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all five documentation-quality dimensions.

verification.command: npm run verify:contracts && npx vitest run tests/unit/restore-coordinator-service.test.ts tests/unit/restore-job-store.test.ts tests/unit/restore-preview-registry.test.ts tests/unit/restore-ui.test.ts tests/unit/backup-service.test.ts tests/unit/local-settings.test.ts tests/unit/background-job-drainer.test.ts tests/unit/desktop-shell-contract.test.ts tests/unit/vault-service-writer-lease.test.ts
verification.evidence: CON-001 through CON-004 and negative fixtures pass; the independently rerun 9-file / 111-test Restore matrix proves explicit identity modes, rollback-first replacement, eight monotonic checkpoints, restart adoption, exact Job/Operation linkage, safe DTOs, localized typed warnings and binding CAS.

Semantic lock schema v3 contains 1,184 claims; eight Restore selectors change only existing partial Vault, Job, Settings, Backup, i18n and Exit projections, while every Requirement, Exit and phase state remains unchanged.

LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass after the bounded Owner/Decision/evidence projection, without PRD or prototype churn, a new governed document, dependency change, permission breadth or unrelated feature expansion.

coordination.taskTitle: Explicit restore identity and durable recovery
coordination.compatibility: The candidate adds explicit clone/replace identity, machine-local restore coordination and safe recovery while preserving the portable archive format, old source bytes, writer-lease ownership, provider and permission boundaries, dependencies, durable schemas and public status states.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze the exact 27-path d12280c1 replacement after full, assembled Electron, restart and packaged evidence. UI Design returned final exact-hash ACCEPTED/CLEAR; Product Planning synchronized only affected Owner/API/Job/Data/Settings/Sync/Reliability/Decision, acceptance and current semantic/recipe surfaces.

nonBlockingRisks: The ordered restore checkpoints are not a general cross-file transaction, and strict cross-process CAS/locking beyond the delivered lease and claim fences remains open.
The final lstat-to-syscall and directory-swap TOCTOU interval remains a platform primitive boundary.
replace_existing preserves the old physical source folder unregistered; permanent cleanup is not part of this flow.
Versioned external dependency and durable-domain migrations beyond the implemented compatibility checks remain open.
Signed installed Windows/macOS restore proof and the broader provider/platform matrix remain open.
